ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "fitness_goal" TEXT /* Fitness goal of the user (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain, endurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or qualification of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., strength training, yoga, Pilates) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the fitness session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., strength training, cardio, group class) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the session (e.g., gym, outdoor, studio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the exercise */,
  "muscle_group" TEXT /* Primary muscle group targeted by the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_exercises" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise */,
  "sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets performed */,
  "repetitions" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions performed */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight used for the exercise in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biometric_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "y_right_shoulder" REAL /* Y coordinate of the right shoulder */,
  "y_left_shoulder" REAL /* Y coordinate of the left shoulder */,
  "x_right_knee" REAL /* X coordinate of the right knee */,
  "y_right_knee" REAL /* Y coordinate of the right knee */,
  "y_left_knee" REAL /* Y coordinate of the left knee */,
  "x_left_knee" REAL /* X coordinate of the left knee */,
  "x_left_ankle" REAL /* X coordinate of the left ankle */,
  "y_left_ankle" REAL /* Y coordinate of the left ankle */,
  "x_right_ankle" REAL /* X coordinate of the right ankle */,
  "y_right_ankle" REAL /* Y coordinate of the right ankle */,
  "correctness" TEXT /* Correctness score indicating movement accuracy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure in mmHg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biometric_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions provided by the user for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress-tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress entry */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "body_fat_percentage" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the user */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the user's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)
